implementation_summary.summary: CP00-684 bridges the RP22 External Integrations I P06 Claude review/closeout tail and the P07 failure-recovery foundation over 150 planned units from RP22.P06.M09.S03 through RP22.P07.M05.S04 while keeping runtime paths closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-684 RP22.P06.M09.S03-RP22.P07.M05.S04 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
